notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cole Carrigg. Javier Sanoja to 2nd. Javier Sanoja advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Cole Carrigg.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks reaches on a fielding error by first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Owen Caissie plunked
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie hit by pitch. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks grounds into a double play, first baseman TJ Rumfield to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Leo Jiménez out at 2nd. Liam Hicks out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks reaches on a fielding error by first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Brian Navarreto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brian Navarreto flies out to center fielder Cole Carrigg.

notableEvents.label: Jakob Marsee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Xavier Edwards out at 2nd. Jakob Marsee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jakob Marsee rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Xavier Edwards out at 2nd. Jakob Marsee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
